title: BEM-894 sending ready
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

required = [
 'governance/state/dispatch_contour.json',
 'governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl',
 'governance/state/worker_contour_lifecycle.json',
 'governance/tools/validate_dispatch_contour.py',
 'governance/tools/validate_worker_inboxes.py',
 'governance/tools/validate_contour_processing.py',
 'governance/tools/run_dispatch_e2e_selftest.py',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM890_DISPATCH_CONTOUR_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM891_WORKER_INBOX_DELIVERY_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM892_CONTOUR_PROCESSING_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM893_E2E_DISPATCH_SELFTEST_PASS.md'
]
missing = [p for p in required if not Path(p).exists()]
queue_done = False
queue_path = Path('governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl')
if queue_path.exists():
    items = [json.loads(x) for x in queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if x.strip()]
    queue_done = bool(items) and all(i.get('status') == 'completed' for i in items)
else:
    items = []
result_count = 0
for contour in ['WRK-C1','WRK-C2','WRK-C3']:
    result_count += len(list((Path('governance/worker/results') / contour).glob('RES-*.json')))
status = 'SENDING_CONTOUR_READY' if not missing and queue_done and result_count >= 3 else 'SENDING_CONTOUR_NOT_READY'
state = {
  'bem':'BEM-894',
  'status':status,
  'dispatch_queue_items':len(items),
  'dispatch_queue_completed':queue_done,
  'worker_result_count':result_count,
  'required_checked':required,
  'missing':missing,
  'meaning':'repository has an operational sending/dispatch contour that routes tasks to Worker contours and receives results' if status == 'SENDING_CONTOUR_READY' else 'sending/dispatch contour has blockers'
}
Path('governance/state/sending_contour_readiness.json').write_text(json.dumps(state, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
manifest = '# BEM-894 Sending contour readiness manifest\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nDispatch queue items: ' + str(len(items)) + '\n\nQueue completed: ' + str(queue_done) + '\n\nWorker result count: ' + str(result_count) + '\n\nRequired artifacts:\n'
for p in required:
    manifest += '- ' + p + '\n'
manifest += '\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n'
Path('governance/dispatch/BEM894_SENDING_CONTOUR_MANIFEST.md').write_text(manifest, encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM894_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY.md').write_text('# BEM-894 Sending contour final report\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n\nQueue completed: ' + str(queue_done) + '\n\nWorker result count: ' + str(result_count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM894_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-894 sending contour proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\nQueue completed: ' + str(queue_done) + '\nWorker result count: ' + str(result_count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
curator = '# BEM-894 FINAL SENDING CONTOUR RESPONSE\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nFindings:\n- Dispatch contour exists.\n- Dispatch queue sends tasks to WRK-C1/WRK-C2/WRK-C3.\n- Worker inbox delivery exists.\n- Worker contour processing returns results.\n- End-to-end dispatch selftest passed.\n\nEvidence:\n- governance/dispatch/BEM894_SENDING_CONTOUR_MANIFEST.md\n- governance/state/sending_contour_readiness.json\n- ' + str(marker) + '\n\nRecommendation:\n- Continue next development stage from operational sending contour baseline.\n'
Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM894_FINAL_SENDING_CONTOUR_RESPONSE.md').write_text(curator, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/sending_contour_readiness.json','governance/dispatch/BEM894_SENDING_CONTOUR_MANIFEST.md','governance/reports/BEM894_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY.md',str(marker),'governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM894_FINAL_SENDING_CONTOUR_RESPONSE.md'])
ops_applied.append('BEM894 sending contour ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
